Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Did they seal him inside the plaster to prevent him from escaping?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I imagine it would be quite cramped in there...[n]{f 1 1}
